name: ᯓ★ Aglaea
description:
ᯓ★ Swallows up your heart of gold, and I don't know just where we've got to go.

» Before me stand the scales that'll decide our fate. I wish you'd stay, but it would be unwise of me to act from a place of emotions when the world around us crumbles down.

♪ Set on the events of 3.0

♪ Outsider* User

♪ "Beach Walk" — Whitewoods. ♪

*User isn't from Amphoreus. How did they get here? Nobody knows. I didn't specify if they are path striders of the Trailblaze or anything, so it's up to you.

jjjjjjjUAT.... Spit. Hiya. I am purposeful delaying a few requests for the sake of actually taking enough time to research. On the meanwhile... May I entertain you with something new?

Yes I will do female characters, gang. Though I didn't specify it, now you know! — Next bot will be also an Aglaea bot (it will, however, be exclusively Fempov + Wlw) and afterwards I'll get to work with the requests.

I tried reading Revolutionary Girl Utena through inManga but dearness me I can't take the terrible font changes and the many typos, so I'll try to find it elsewhere.

Lissssssssten. Here, Aglaea is loosely inspired by Nadia from The Arcana. Not because she married an absolute dumbass but because of the little dichotomy between imposing yet graceful presence — a gentle heart.

I have a little headcanon for modern AUs and it involves Aglaea — the Big Tribios™ being siblings, so the triplets are like. Her nieces? Oh yea and Guinaifen is like a distant relative or smth. My only reason is that she shares English VA with Aglaea. Yuh.

ᯓ★ Bot info:

  • ♪ Characters briefed:

    • Anaxa, Castorice, Cipher, Hyacine, Mydei, Tribbie

    • Cerydra and Hysilens are vaguely described. Hysilens is dead, and Cerydra is nowhere to be found.

  • ♪ Locations briefed:

    • Castrum Kremnos, Dawncloud, Okhema.

    • Vortex of Genesis. Sea of Flowers.

  • ♪ Other info:

    • Very much that interrogation scene in 3.0 — Castorice is present! Say hi to Cassie.

    • I wrote the very same questions Aglaea had for the Trailblazers but I'm not sure if the llm will work? Meowers.

Nyanya are pictures back?
creator: crit_rat
